---
title: "Shambhala Mirror standards"
# image: bristlecone.jpg
# image-alt: "The oldest living species of tree, the bristlecone pine, in the White Mountains of California."
# about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
---

Background

## History

The Societal Mirror is a 5-year effort to support the Shambhala Community's ability to look at itself -- as a community and an organization. 

## Opportunity

The [https://mirror.shambhala.org](Shambhala Societal Mirror) has evolved incrementally over the years.  This standards site is an opportunity to look at its current state and describe it in a way that accelerates the next phase of development.  The goal is to create a set of standards that can be used to guide future development.

## What's included

- DRAFT website standards
- Industry standards from mature Newsrooms
- Some website metrics

## Possible futures

- Standards for processing open-ended comments
- Survey standards
